summary: The diff implements all six requirements at a high level. OrbitDock gains a 4th Collections item at 90° intervals, the CollectionsIcon SVG uses a 2×2 grid with rx/ry 1.5 and strokeWidth 2.3 (within the 2.2–2.5 range), CollectionsFullScreenView is created with thumbnail grid, link/note/file handling, and lazy loading, and HomePage wires it in with a showCollections state. However, several specific acceptance criteria cannot be fully verified from the truncated diff, and a few details appear potentially missing or unclear.

missing_requirements.requirement: Icon color is #D97706 in light mode and #FBBF24 in dark mode; inactive state renders at 60% opacity
missing_requirements.reason: The OrbitDock diff is truncated after the ITEMS/constants block and the CollectionsIcon definition — the color logic (#D97706 / #FBBF24) and the 60% opacity treatment for inactive items cannot be confirmed from the visible diff content.

missing_requirements.requirement: Reuse existing file-selection logic (single select, multi-select, select all, move to Mission, move to Folder, delete, share) exactly as in GallerySection/StackFilesFullScreenView — no new mutation hooks or selection state managers
missing_requirements.reason: The CollectionsFullScreenView diff is truncated after the FileThumbnail component definition. The wiring of existing hooks/dialogs (MoveToMissionDialog, SendToFolderDialog, existing delete mutation, share utility, select-all) is imported but cannot be confirmed as fully wired up from the visible portion of the file.

missing_requirements.requirement: Lazy loading is applied so off-screen thumbnails load on scroll
missing_requirements.reason: FileThumbnail for link files uses loading='lazy' on the favicon img tag, but the broader lazy loading strategy for the grid (e.g., IntersectionObserver or virtual scrolling for large collections) cannot be confirmed from the truncated diff.
